question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/record/RecordDownloaderProperties.java -> Scope: Medium: Impacts caused by griefing with no economic damage to any user on the network'] [Function: isPersistBytes()] Can an unprivileged external user enable `persistBytes` and then submit a large number of transactions to the Hedera network, causing the mirror node to persist large raw record file bytes for each file, leading to database bloat and degraded query performance for all users?
